{"id":"project-LICHEN-2h1i.2","title":"task","description":"## Killer Apps (run all simultaneously on big screen)

### 1. Find My Hacker - Live crowd map
- Big screen shows GPS dots of all 500 nodes in real-time
- Search by node name -> highlight on map
- Privacy mode: opt-out hides your dot
- Heatmap overlay: where is the crowd?

### 2. DEF CON Confessions - Anonymous mesh board
- E-ink displays scrolling anonymous messages
- Type on phone (BLE to node) -> mesh -> gateway -> big screen
- Upvote from your node
- Messages expire after 10 minutes
- No accounts, no tracking, no logs

### 3. Mesh Telemetry - Proof it works
- Packets/sec (live graph)
- Node count (watch it grow as people arrive)
- Collision rate (proving TDMA works)
- RSSI heatmap (RF coverage)

### 4. Dead Drop - Encrypted store-and-forward
- Leave message for specific node ID
- Stored on gateways until recipient in range
- E2E encrypted (OSCORE)
- DTN demo: delivered hours later when they walked by","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:58:19.34026Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:58:19.34026Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2h1i.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2h1i","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:58:19.46826Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Fleshed 4 killer apps (crowd map/FindMyHacker, confessions, telemetry, deaddrop) into CoAP/SenML/OSCORE/UI specifics; created 8 actionable child feature beads 2h1i.2.1-.8 for impl
